backend.bar: Strong architecture thinking, enterprise patterns, collaboration
backend.portfolio_bar: Large-scale backend system or significant open source contribution
backend.interview_format: Phone screening → 2 technical rounds → design round → on-site

cloud.interview_format: Technical assessment → architecture discussion → team interviews

resume_requirements: Impact orientation, team collaboration examples, product thinking
hiring_philosophy: Look for curiosity, collaboration, growth mindset
compensation_expectations: Very competitive, strong benefits, stock options
career_path: Learning culture, diverse roles available, mentorship programs
unique_aspects: Strong focus on diversity and inclusion, learning stipend
